Welcome to DBGT Network Version 5.0. Fully re-designed to give easier navigation and interface. The DBGT Network webmaster & staff are dedicated to offer you the best Dragon Ball content from all over the net. Many features of the site are always being improved to please the visitor. If you don't like something on this site don't hesitate to tell us what it is. This site has grown to be one of the most interactive sites on the net today. Enjoy your visit!
All news posts reported here is strictly for dbgt.com only. You may post any news on your site only with a source link back to ours. All news reported here is sourced if obtained elsewhere.

Forgot to mention...
 I forgot to mention that most of my minor updates are no longer posted on the main news page. If you see at the top section in the news ticker a section called, "Latest DBGT.COM Additions/Updates" for now it contains the top 3 latest updates such as Original Sketches, Universe, and Fusions. That's all for now..

 Register - Post Comments (10)
 Posted: Thursday, May 23, 2002 » fRaNk
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Dbgt Reviewed and New Tutorial Coming..
 Hey what's up Im currently working on a fireworks tutorial and a more in depth php tutorial. I've been getting many emails from fans about php so im deciding to make a tutorial on it since some fans don't understand the one we currently have up. I was just surfing the net and I came across this site Genkidama.Online the webmaster is very friendly and they have a review on dbgt check them out if you would like to view it...That's about it for now check out my tutorials sometime next week.

 Register - Post Comments (8)
 Posted: Saturday, May 18, 2002 » GogetaXl
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

FUNimation bords, Zstore accounts
 Hey I haven't posted in a long time but ive got some info you might want to hear about!
Upon looking at the official dragonball z site I see that Zstore should be up and you will need to register a new account if you had an existing one before the face lift. Some of the new features of the store include Live support via instant messaging and special prices for members! Click here to visit the store.
FUNimation have also started up a message board for the programs they promote/produce! I haven't been there yet but im sure its gonna be busy if you want to go there you will need to follow their rules and sign-up as with any other board, also note it is only a test version. Click here to go there!
Also if you own a site you can check how your site is doing in traffic ranking out of all the sites in the world! Go to http://info.alexa.com and type in a sites url in the search box and you can get a few stats on your site! for example DBGT.COM's traffic ranking out of all the sites in the world is 28,216!
See the newspost below for The Legacy of Goku info release or click the image on the right navigation to buy it!

 Register - Post Comments (32)
 Posted: Friday, May 17, 2002 » Deano
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

DBZ: The Legacy of Goku
 Is now out in stores, some stores were already selling them yesterday. So everyone who ordered one through an online store such as amazon.com should be getting their copy very soon. If you haven't already bought yourself one don't worry it's not too late, just click on the image on the right navigation with the picture of the game and you'll be taken to the page where you can order it. You can also pre-order the Collectible Card Game, click on our DBGT Store then go to Video Games for more info on buying DBZ Games.

 Register - Post Comments (6)
 Posted: Friday, May 17, 2002 » fRaNk
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Fusions updated...
 The information section has been updated, I re-added our fusions page with a few upgrades to it. It now shows more detail to each fusion than before. Community section has a minor addition to it and I have been moving some of the sections around. You can also notice an icon near our main banner(looks like a book and one of these: ?) well that'll take you to our F.A.Q. More info updates coming very soon...

Tutorials.............
 Hey... Long time no post eh ?
Well I have been revising, for exams and they start tomorrow when they are over I am free and will be adding content.
Peace

 Posted: Sunday, May 12, 2002 » Fantasy Anime XL
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Aussie News...
 Australian DBZ fans, your favorite program is back by popular demand and in a premium timeslot, too. Dragon Ball Z is now on Channel 10 in the No. 1 timeslot of 7:30 a.m. Series 1 is currently airing and will be followed by Series 4 episodes.

source: official site

 Register - Post Comments (2)
 Posted: Saturday, May 11, 2002 » fRaNk
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

New poll too...
 We got a new poll too, the result to the last one is as follows: Android 18 being the most favorite female character with 7,675 votes, Videl in second with 4,509 votes, and finally in third place Bulma with 4,259 votes. The new poll is basically on whether you like the idea of the new live action movie or not.
